content.en:
"The effect of the Chilin Ancient Spear is about three times that of the Eternal Demon Pillar!"

Ye Tian said in surprise.

He felt that the demon seed Gu Dui could have that kind of strength, and the Red Lin Ancient Spear was very useful.

This is the transformation of the Chilin Ancient Tree, but it has been refined into the Chilin Ancient Spear by the Demon Seed Gu Dusk, and there is no way to turn it into the Chilin Ancient Tree again.

However, its effect is still there.

With this Chilin Ancient Spear, his Eternal Dao Seed Refining Effect would definitely be very high.

And those ordinary Chilin Ancient Spears, he also assigned them to his relatives.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to cultivate here in the Endless Realm Alliance, refining his Eternal Dao Species, and also browsing various materials and knowledge in the library of the Xuanxing Holy Gate.

Moreover, he also saw the ordinary Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance Method in the library of the Xuanxing Holy Gate, but unfortunately he couldn't bring it out.

But when he takes charge of the ruins of the Holy Gate, he can bring it out.

Of course, the library he is entering now is just an ordinary library, and the inheritance library that records the method of spiritual inheritance in the upper grade realm is still not qualified to enter.

......

The years passed, and the long years passed.

During this period of time, occasionally some demon seeds came to the abyss of despair, but they were all killed by Ye Tian.

The Abyss of Despair was a good place for him, and it would be a fitting place to conduct a more dangerous experiment.

So, 600 he won't give up here for the time being.

this day.

Ye Tian received a summons from the Realm Court.

"Boundary Court Meeting!"

This was a small gathering of the Eternal Realm Realm Boundary Court Branch, and it was also a trade fair.

Ye Tian was ready to go over and take a look.

So, one of his replica bodies went to the Realm Court branch with some treasures.

After some time, Ye Tian rushed to the Boundary Court Branch.

This time.

Many Eternal Realm Divine Realms have gathered here, and most of them are ordinary Eternal Realm Divine Realm powerhouses, and they have not even cultivated Eternal Realm Spirits.

But there are also a few powerhouses of the Eternal Realm God Realm who have condensed an Eternal Realm spirit.

And the Eternal Realm Divine Realm Beginner powerhouses who condense two Eternal Realm spirits are rare, after all, almost all of these Eternal Realm Divine Realm Beginner Rank powerhouses go to the Eternal Realm Realm, and rarely stay at the Eternal Realm Realm.

Of course.

These Eternal Realm Divine Realm beginner-level powerhouses are also qualified to travel freely between the Eternal Realm and the Realm God Realm, and their status is above that of ordinary Eternal Realm Divine Realms.

And the strongest person in the Eternal Realm Realm Realm Division is a middle-level powerhouse in the Eternal Realm God Realm, and his strength is extremely powerful, and he has always been sitting here.

This is also to prevent accidents from happening, and it is not possible to do without a strong person in charge.

Compared with the other party, Ye Tian's current strength is still the difference between cloud and mud, and the gap is too big.

Time passed, and gradually, this time the Realm Court meeting began.

The purpose of the Realm Court Minor Association is to trade some resources with each other to promote the progress of all the Eternal Realm God Realms.

After all, the resources of the Eternal Realm are limited, far inferior to the Realm God Realm, and they naturally want to maximize the benefits of their resources when they are unable to apply to enter the Realm God Realm.

One by one, the Eternal Realm God Realm took out good things and used them to trade various resource treasures, among which the treasure of the Evil Vine was undoubtedly a very high-level resource treasure, and many Eternal Realm God Realms were very eager for it.

However, Ye Tian didn't take it out for trading, and was still waiting.

If he doesn't come across the item he wants to trade, he's not interested in trading.

......

"This is the Eternal Treasure!"

Ye Tian saw a member of the Eternal Realm God Realm Beginner Realm and took out several Eternal Realm treasures, wanting to trade some resources that could accelerate the refining of the Eternal Dao Seed.

The Eternal Realm Treasure is a treasure that surpasses the Eternal Primordial Treasure, and it is very rare.

If it is the former Eternal Realm (CGEG), it is rich in energy and has no death zone, and it can still give birth to the Eternal Realm Treasure.

But now, the Eternal Realm is full of death zones, and even if many treasure lands still exist, the energy is no longer enough to give birth to the Eternal Realm Treasure.

So.

Eternal Realm Treasures can almost only be conceived in the Realm God Kingdom Realm, but even in the Realm God Kingdom Realm, Eternal Realm Treasures are rare and highly valuable.

Therefore, this Eternal Realm Divine Realm junior powerhouse took out the Eternal Realm Treasure, which naturally attracted the attention of many Eternal Realm Divine Realms.

"Ladies and gentlemen, these are the Eternal Realm Treasures, and this one is the Eternal Realm Treasure-Tianlun Spear, which can greatly improve combat effectiveness. "

"This Eternal Realm Treasure is a Star Soul Shuttle, which can be used to escape and travel!"

"There is also this Eternal Realm Treasure Tianyan Roulette, which is an Eternal Realm Treasure of the deduction type, even if it is the Eternal Realm Spirit Technique, it can be done!"

"Lord Qin Xuan, although I haven't been to the Realm God Realm, I also know that this kind of Eternal Realm Treasure that deduces the Eternal Realm Spirit Technique, the side effects should be great, right? Otherwise, you won't take it out and trade it. "

An Eternal Realm God Realm said.

Qin Xuan nodded slightly: "Yes, there are indeed some side effects, that is, you need to use the Eternal Dao Seed to urge this Tianyan Roulette, and it will accelerate the transformation of the Demon Seed, even if the Eternal Dao Seed is solidified, it will still gradually become a Demon Seed." However, in case a certain Eternal Realm God Realm of your faction is about to turn into a demon, then there is nothing wrong with paying the price and creating an ordinary Eternal Realm Spirit Technique!"

"This ......"

One Eternal Realm God Realm shook his head, they didn't dare to ask for such an Eternal Realm treasure, this was completely sacrificing themselves!

Who wants to?

Even those Eternal Realm God Realms who are about to turn into demons are not willing to give up on themselves, and they must still want to struggle and save themselves.

Therefore, such an eternal realm treasure is too chicken.

And Ye Tian heard Qin Xuan's introduction, and his heart moved.

This Tianyan Roulette is very similar to the Ruined Sun Disk, except that the Ruined Sun Disc is just an Eternal Primordial Treasure, while the Tianyan Roulette is an Eternal Realm Treasure that surpasses the Eternal Primordial Treasure.

Therefore, the value of Tianyan Roulette is higher.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian opened his mouth and said, "This Eternal Realm Treasure Tianyan Roulette, I want it!"

Qin Xuan looked at Ye Tian with a look of surprise.

He could naturally see that Ye Tian was also a primary-level powerhouse in the Eternal Realm God Realm, condensed an Eternal Realm spirit, and his aura was very powerful.

However, he had never seen Ye Tian before, and this was the first time.

It stands to reason that he knows all the powerhouses of the Eternal Realm Boundary Realm Branch, and there is no Ye Tian among them.

"It may be a certain Eternal Realm God Realm beginner powerhouse sent down by the Realm God Realm!"

Qin Xuan secretly said in his heart.
